translated: Alright, so I've picked out some scenes I personally want to talk about. Let's take a look together.
Since I've already chosen my own career path, seeing the moment someone else makes their choice,
even if it's just through an event story,
there are definitely moments where you wonder if you're doing the right thing.
But if you can look back 10 or 20 years from now
and feel glad that you made that choice back then,
then I think that's a wonderful thing. And I believe effort is what makes that possible.
When it comes to things that require effort, I don't think there's such a thing as a 'right' or 'wrong' choice.
With a choice that requires effort, maybe in a year or two,
you might have times where you regret it and think you shouldn't have done it.
But looking back after 10 or 20 years, I'm sure there are times when it all connects in the end.
You'll realize, 'If I hadn't done that then, I wouldn't be where I am now.'
Even if you're in a different field, I'm sure you'll feel that way. For those of you working hard now,
or if there's something you want to strive for, I hope this event story gives you the courage to keep going or make that decision. That's the kind of story it was.
